case_title: NISHAN SWEIS AUTO VS. NATIONWIDE AUCTION SYSTEMS INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF COURT GRANTING MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT, OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER NISHAN SWEIS AUTO SERVED OCT-08-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT NATIONWIDE AUCTION SYSTEMS INC

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER NISHAN SWEIS AUTO HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NISHAN SWEIS AUTO MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR #7235

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NISHAN SWEIS AUTO RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT NATIONWIDE AUCTION SYSTEMS INC $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $385.00 COSTS, $18,235.33 ARBITRATION AWARD, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,120.33, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT"
